responses:
theorem Topology.P2_implies_P3 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    Topology.P2 A → Topology.P3 A := by
  intro h
  unfold Topology.P2 Topology.P3 at h ⊢
  have hsub : interior (closure (interior A)) ⊆ interior (closure A) :=
    interior_mono (closure_mono interior_subset)
  exact Set.Subset.trans h hsub

theorem P2_implies_P1 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    Topology.P2 A → Topology.P1 A := by
  intro hA
  dsimp [Topology.P2, Topology.P1] at *
  intro x hx
  have hx' : x ∈ interior (closure (interior A)) := hA hx
  exact (Set.interior_subset) hx'

theorem P2_implies_P3 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    Topology.P2 A → Topology.P3 A := by
  intro h
  intro x hxA
  have hx' : x ∈ interior (closure (interior A)) := h hxA
  have hsub : interior (closure (interior A)) ⊆ interior (closure A) := by
    apply interior_mono
    have hIA : interior A ⊆ (A : Set X) := interior_subset
    exact closure_mono hIA
  exact hsub hx'
